field_values.action_summary: Following the ceremony, warriors begin the heavy labor of transporting eggs from subterranean vaults to the incubator to prepare for the next five-year incubation cycle. This demonstrates the biological selection process and resource regulation.
field_values.camera_intent: Wide shots of martian_warriors moving eggs; Close-ups of eggs and subterranean environment; Montage-style transport sequences
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Lighting transitions from Subterranean Vaults to the_incubator_enclosure
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH007_SC003

## Production Intent
Establish the logistical burden of Martian survival through the heavy, systematic movement of biological assets. The transition from ceremony to labor must feel physically taxing and strictly regulated to emphasize resource scarcity.

## Required Cast
- martian_warriors (15ft tall, olive-green skin, blood-red eyes, four arms)

## Required Environments
- Subterranean Vaults
- the_incubator_enclosure

## Continuity Constraints
- Egg appearance and handling consistency
- Lighting transitions from Subterranean Vaults to the_incubator_enclosure

## Beat List
- BT001: Retrieval of eggs from vaults
- BT002: Systematic transport
- BT003: Incubation placement
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity

evidence_summary: To show the logistical reality of Martian survival and the strict management of their dwindling resources.

Following the ceremony, warriors begin the heavy labor of transporting eggs from subterranean vaults to the incubator to prepare for the next five-year incubation cycle. This demonstrates the biological selection process and resource regulation.

Establish the logistical burden of Martian survival through the heavy, systematic movement of biological assets. The transition from ceremony to labor must feel physically taxing and strictly regulated to emphasize resource scarcity.
